title: scleria balansae
intro: Scleria balansae, also known as Balansa's club sedge or Balansa's sedge, is a species of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Scleria balansae include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. Scleria balansae is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its leaves and stems can be dried and used in various herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
